contract_clause: Definition of Confidential Information Confidential Information includes business plans, source code, customer lists, financial information, trade secrets, and any information marked confidential
rule_reason: Risk determined by weighted similarity and anomaly scoring.

contract_clause: Obligations of Receiving Party The Receiving Party shall protect Confidential Information and shall not disclose it to third parties without prior written consent
matched_standard_clause: The receiving party shall not disclose confidential information.
rule_reason: Risk determined by weighted similarity and anomaly scoring.

contract_clause: Exclusions Information that is publicly available, independently developed, or lawfully obtained from a third party shall not be considered Confidential Information
rule_reason: Risk determined by weighted similarity and anomaly scoring.

contract_clause: Return of Information Upon written request, the Receiving Party shall return or destroy all Confidential Information
matched_standard_clause: The receiving party shall not disclose confidential information.
rule_reason: Risk determined by weighted similarity and anomaly scoring.

contract_clause: Term The confidentiality obligations shall remain in effect for five years after termination of this Agreement
matched_standard_clause: The receiving party shall not disclose confidential information.
rule_reason: Risk determined by weighted similarity and anomaly scoring.

contract_clause: Risky Clause - Broad Disclosure Right The Receiving Party may disclose Confidential Information to any affiliate without obtaining prior consent from the Disclosing Party
matched_standard_clause: The receiving party shall not disclose confidential information.

contract_clause: Risky Clause - Unlimited Liability Waiver The Disclosing Party waives all claims arising from unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information
matched_standard_clause: The receiving party shall not disclose confidential information.

contract_clause: Risky Clause - One-Sided Termination The Receiving Party may terminate this Agreement at any time without notice, while the Disclosing Party may not terminate the Agreement
Governing Law This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the applicable jurisdiction

contract_clause: Severability If any provision is held invalid, the remaining provisions shall remain in effect
